{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Lindson
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Dreadgod (novel)|Dreadgod]]
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] has a [[Forged blue-white handprint]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
